requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs Americas-Region Connector (SAE J1772 / CCS1) — Confirm with EAS/EBS
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与美洲地区接口（SAE J1772 / CCS1）——请向EAS/EBS确认
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與美洲地區接口（SAE J1772 / CCS1）——請向EAS/EBS確認

summary.en: Suriname is geographically in the Americas region and operates a 60 Hz electrical grid supplied by EBS, making it part of the Americas connector ecosystem. The Americas-region standard for AC EV charging is the SAE J1772 (Type 1) coupler, defined in SAE J1772, which uses a 5-pin configuration with a proximity pilot (PP) and control pilot (CP) and is compatible with IEC 61851-1 Mode 3 charging. The Americas-region DC fast-charging standard is the Combined Charging System 1 (CCS1), which adds two DC power pins below the J1772 AC connector face. As of 2026-06-14, no single published Suriname national standard mandating SAE J1772 / CCS1 exclusively for EV chargers was confirmed from official SSB, EAS, or EBS sources. The SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau) is an ISO member and IEC Affiliate Member and generally adopts international or regional standards (CARICOM/COPANT) rather than publishing domestic originals. EAS is the energy sector regulator and EBS is the utility; both must be contacted directly to confirm the connector type required for any specific Suriname EV charger installation or project. Exporters should not assume IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 (the European standard) applies to Suriname — Suriname's Americas-region 60 Hz grid aligns with J1772 / CCS1, not Type 2 / CCS2.
summary.zh: 苏里南地理位置属于美洲地区，采用EBS供应的60 Hz电网，属于美洲接口体系。美洲地区交流电动汽车充电标准为SAE J1772（Type 1）耦合器，采用5针配置，具有接近导引（PP）和控制导引（CP），兼容IEC 61851-1 Mode 3充电。美洲地区直流快充标准为联合充电系统1（CCS1），在J1772交流接口面下方增加两个直流功率引脚。截至2026年6月14日，未能从SSB、EAS或EBS官方来源确认苏里南已发布的单一国家标准强制要求电动汽车充电桩使用SAE J1772 / CCS1。苏里南标准局（SSB）是ISO成员和IEC联络会员，通常采用国际或地区标准（CARICOM/COPANT），而非发布国内原创标准。EAS是能源行业监管机构，EBS是电力公司，两者均须直接联系以确认具体苏里南电动汽车充电桩安装或项目所需的接口类型。出口商不应假设IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（欧洲标准）适用于苏里南——苏里南的美洲地区60 Hz电网与J1772 / CCS1对齐，而非Type 2 / CCS2。
summary.zht: 蘇里南地理位置屬於美洲地區，採用EBS供應的60 Hz電網，屬於美洲接口體系。美洲地區交流電動汽車充電標準為SAE J1772（Type 1）耦合器，採用5針配置，具有接近導引（PP）和控制導引（CP），兼容IEC 61851-1 Mode 3充電。美洲地區直流快充標準為聯合充電系統1（CCS1），在J1772交流接口面下方增加兩個直流功率引脚。截至2026年6月14日，未能從SSB、EAS或EBS官方來源確認蘇里南已發佈的單一國家標準強制要求電動汽車充電樁使用SAE J1772 / CCS1。蘇里南標準局（SSB）是ISO成員和IEC聯絡會員，通常採用國際或地區標準（CARICOM/COPANT），而非發佈國內原創標準。EAS是能源行業監管機構，EBS是電力公司，兩者均須直接聯繫以確認具體蘇里南電動汽車充電樁安裝或項目所需的接口類型。出口商不應假設IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2（歐洲標準）適用於蘇里南——蘇里南的美洲地區60 Hz電網與J1772 / CCS1對齊，而非Type 2 / CCS2。

standards_or_laws: SAE J1772 — SAE Electric Vehicle Conductive Charge Coupler (AC Type 1, Americas region)
SAE J1772 / CCS1 — Combined Charging System 1 (DC fast charging, Americas region)
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau) — ISO member, IEC Affiliate Member (iso.org/member/548208)
EBS (N.V. Energie Bedrijven Suriname) — electricity utility

summary.en: China AC chargers use the GB/T 20234.2 coupler and DC fast chargers use the GB/T 20234.3 coupler. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler visually resembles the SAE J1772 Type 1 in overall size, they differ in connector gender, pin count, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling protocol, and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible — a GB/T plug cannot mate with a J1772 vehicle inlet, and vice versa. The GB/T 20234.3 DC coupler is geometrically and electrically different from CCS1: it uses a nine-pin configuration with GB/T 27930 CAN bus communication, incompatible with the CCS1 power connector geometry and the IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 communication stack used in the Americas DC charging ecosystem. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector hardware.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器在整体尺寸上与SAE J1772 Type 1外观相近，但两者在接口性别、引脚数量、接近导引和控制导引信号协议，以及触点排列上均不同，导致物理和电气不兼容——GB/T插头无法与J1772车辆接口配对，反之亦然。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS1在几何形状和电气上均不同：它采用九针配置和GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与美洲直流充电生态系统中使用的CCS1功率接口几何形状和IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通信栈不兼容。转接器不是项目合规接口硬件的替代方案。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器在整體尺寸上與SAE J1772 Type 1外觀相近，但兩者在接口性別、引脚數量、接近導引和控制導引信號協議，以及觸點排列上均不同，導致物理和電氣不兼容——GB/T插頭無法與J1772車輛接口配對，反之亦然。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS1在幾何形狀和電氣上均不同：它採用九針配置和GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與美洲直流充電生態系統中使用的CCS1功率接口幾何形狀和IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118通訊棧不兼容。轉接器不是項目合規接口硬件的替代方案。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Suriname deployments if the local installation requires SAE J1772 AC or CCS1 DC — as is typical for the Americas 60 Hz region. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling (J1772 PP/CP differs from GB/T CC/CP), DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 for CCS1 DC stations), labels, test reports, and spare-part strategy. Exporters must: (1) confirm with EAS, EBS, and the specific project owner which connector type is required before quoting or shipping; (2) confirm that no alternative connector (e.g. NACS/Tesla in Americas, Type 2) is specified by the project; (3) obtain the redesigned connector's SAE test evidence if required by the project. Adapters are not a project-compliant substitute for hardware redesign.
gap.zh: 如苏里南安装需要交流SAE J1772或直流CCS1（美洲60 Hz地区的典型要求），仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不具备接口兼容性。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号（J1772 PP/CP与GB/T CC/CP不同）、直流通信栈（CCS1直流充电站需从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告和备件策略进行硬件重新设计。出口商须：(1) 在报价或发货前向EAS、EBS及具体项目业主确认所需接口类型；(2) 确认项目未指定其他接口（如美洲NACS/特斯拉、Type 2）；(3) 如项目要求，获取重新设计接口的SAE测试证据。转接器不是符合项目要求的硬件重新设计替代方案。
gap.zht: 如蘇里南安裝需要交流SAE J1772或直流CCS1（美洲60 Hz地區的典型要求），僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不具備接口兼容性。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號（J1772 PP/CP與GB/T CC/CP不同）、直流通訊棧（CCS1直流充電站需從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告和備件策略進行硬件重新設計。出口商須：(1) 在報價或發貨前向EAS、EBS及具體項目業主確認所需接口類型；(2) 確認項目未指定其他接口（如美洲NACS/特斯拉、Type 2）；(3) 如項目要求，獲取重新設計接口的SAE測試證據。轉接器不是符合項目要求的硬件重新設計替代方案。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with EAS/EBS — no single published Suriname national EV-charger connector standard was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; Americas-region 60 Hz grid context strongly suggests SAE J1772 / CCS1 ecosystem; physical incompatibility with GB/T makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign regardless of which connector is ultimately specified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not a SAE J1772 / CCS1 substitute; physical and protocol incompatibility means GB/T connectors cannot mate with J1772 / CCS1 vehicle inlets

source.publisher: ISO — SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau) member profile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion from GB/T to SAE J1772 / CCS1 is a hardware and protocol redesign. Confirm the connector type required by EAS, EBS, and the specific project before quoting, labelling, or shipping. Do not assume the European IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 standard applies to Suriname — Suriname's 60 Hz Americas-region grid context points to J1772 / CCS1. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into J1772 vehicle inlets and vice versa.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从GB/T转换为SAE J1772 / CCS1的接口改造是硬件和协议重新设计。在报价、贴标或发货前，须向EAS、EBS及具体项目确认所需接口类型。不应假设欧洲IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2标准适用于苏里南——苏里南60 Hz美洲地区电网环境指向J1772 / CCS1。GB/T接口无法插入J1772车辆接口，反之亦然。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從GB/T轉換為SAE J1772 / CCS1的接口改造是硬件和協議重新設計。在報價、貼標或發貨前，須向EAS、EBS及具體項目確認所需接口類型。不應假設歐洲IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2標準適用於蘇里南——蘇里南60 Hz美洲地區電網環境指向J1772 / CCS1。GB/T接口無法插入J1772車輛接口，反之亦然。
